---
title: "Workstation setup"
transition_status: "updated"
transition_comment: "update"
---

An ansible repository for the default workstation stack is available here:

{{< iconify fluent:cloud-sync-48-regular style="color: white;" >}} [workstation-setup](https://github.com/fs-ise/workstation-setup){.btn .btn-primary .btn-center rel="noopener" target=_blank}

**Workstation stack**

- **Base** (Minimal Fedora, debloated GNOME)
- **Dev** (Visual Studio Code, Git + LFS, Python, Docker, SSH)
- **Research** (Quarto, LaTeX, Pandoc tooling, Obsidian)
- **Documents** (Okular, OCR, GROBID, Recoll)
- **Sync & Backup** (Nextcloud, Vorta/Borg)
- **Productivity & Media** (Thunderbird, Chrome, GIMP, Audacity, OBS Studio)
- **Security** (KeePassXC, ClamAV)

## Software

- [VPN](https://www.uni-bamberg.de/its/dienstleistungen/netz/vpn/einrichten/){target=_blank}: Some Services are only available via VPN or within the university network
- [Proxy servers](https://dataimpulse.com/#pricing){target=_blank}: Residential proxy server service
- [LanguageTools](https://languagetool.org/de){target=_blank}: Free Online Spellchecker (local setup: see academy)
- [GitHub Desktop](https://github.com/apps/desktop){target=_blank}

::: {.callout-note title="Thunderbird"}
Extensions (install manually, not through ansible)

- LanguageTool
- mailmindr
- FiltaQuilla
- Owl for Exchange
- Thunderbird MCP (TBD)

Calendar permissions (set in Outlook): 

- Sharing calendars -> You decide what the other person can see
- Permission settings -> In your own calendar, click on "Eigenschaften" -> "Berechtigungen"
:::


::: {.callout-note title="Potential extensions"}
- [LanguageTools](https://github.com/languagetool-org/languagetool){target=_blank} - see [here](https://chatgpt.com/c/69d35fd3-df94-8392-b094-1f0964a56c21)
- [rclone](https://github.com/rclone/rclone){target=_blank} for Dropbox, GoogleDrive, etc.
- Local LLM setup (Ollama, Gemma 4, ...), agentic, Thunderbird MCP ...
- Citation manager (TBD: Git-based?)
- Reference extraction pipelines (Grobid/document)
- Jupyter Lab
- Venvs
- Rstudio
- Whisper (see how-to) - or [speechnote](https://github.com/mkiol/dsnote)
- TODO: integrate material from academy?
- [Teams for Linux](https://github.com/ISMAELMARTINEZ/teams-for-linux){target=_blank}?

Custom scripts:

- CoLRev: document
- Labot ?
- Digital-tickler
- Boot checks

:::

- [Software for teaching](/teaching/systems.html)
- [Sotware for research](/research/systems.html)

## Cloud services

- Teams: 

    - Platform for collaboration and organization, allowing users to create different areas called "Teams" to work together or manage part of their online teaching
    - Shared chat and separate chats in different channels
    - Lectures and seminars can be held as phone or video meetings with up to 250 participants
    - Recording functionality
    - Collaborate on files within a team

- [Bookings](https://www.microsoft.com/de-de/microsoft-365/business/scheduling-and-booking-app){target=_blank}: Scheduling of individual appointments (based on availability)
- [Nuudel](https://nuudel.digitalcourage.de/){target=_blank}: Scheduling of group meetings ([Doodle](https://doodle.com/de/){target=_blank} replacement])
- [Youtube procedure](https://intranet.neuro.polymtl.ca/computing-resources/youtube.html){target=_blank}

<!--

[Zoom](https://www.uni-bamberg.de/its/dienstleistungen/tele/video/zoom/){target=_blank}| - Single-Sign-On-Url: ``uni-bamberg``<br>- Online service for web conferencing<br>- Teaching as Meetings or Webinars<br>- Recording functionality<br>- For events that exclusively involve members students of our university, please use [Teams](#teams) because of data security and privacy concerns |
- [Eduroam](https://www.uni-bamberg.de/its/dienstleistungen/netz/wlan/eduroam/){target=_blank}: Log-in with university credentials
[Calendly](https://calendly.com/event_types/user/me){target=_blank}| - Allow students to book appointments, which are automatically added to the Outlook calendar<br>- Example: [30-minute meeting](https://calendly.com/gerit-wagner/30min?month=2023-07){target=_blank} |

-->
